CVE-2023-46045.title: Graphviz 2.36.0 through 9.x before 10.0.1 has an out-of-bounds re ...
CVE-2023-46045.description: Graphviz 2.36.0 through 9.x before 10.0.1 has an out-of-bounds read via a crafted config6a file. NOTE: exploitability may be uncommon because this file is typically owned by root.
